bullets: Replaced manual project tracking across a 30-member cross-functional team with a real-time internal and client-facing dashboard, cutting reporting lag from 4 days to 24 hours.
Designed and deployed Agile/Scrum delivery SOPs across 6 cross-functional teams — standardising sprint ceremonies, definition-of-done criteria, and escalation protocols.
Improved sprint predictability and on-time task completion by establishing clear governance frameworks across all delivery teams.
Owned risk tracking and milestone management across project modules, coordinating cross-functional stakeholders to deliver all deliverables on time and within scope.
Maintained clear visibility of project health through structured reporting and escalation frameworks.

Defined product strategy and led end-to-end delivery of a clinical mental health monitoring MVP — conducted competitive research across 8+ market tools and coordinated engineering, clinical, and design stakeholders from discovery through launch.
Owned full product roadmap and sprint planning for an 18-member engineering team; introduced capacity planning and sprint KPIs that raised on-time delivery to 95% within six months.
Drove backlog prioritization, acceptance criteria, and resource allocation to lift team efficiency by 20%.
Diagnosed UX friction in the student portal; led a redesign validated via A/B testing, delivering a 40% lift in task completion rate and a 25% reduction in time-to-task.
Built a Python-based scraping pipeline (Selenium + BeautifulSoup) to extract 50k records/week, improving reporting accuracy and accessibility.
Implemented stakeholder-driven features and built Django modules to support product reporting needs.
Contributed to Agile SDLC phases including requirements, testing, and deployment; gained hands-on exposure to sprint planning and CI/CD workflows.
Assisted sprint planning and Agile ceremonies; supported PMs in backlog grooming and release planning.
